zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Badlesmere於大約1316年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere42歲，母親Margaret de Clare30歲。她於大約1330年與Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於從1344年到1347年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Badlesmere于大约1316年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere42岁，母亲Margaret de Clare30岁。她于大约1330年与Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于从1344年到1347年。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Badlesmere was born about 1316, in Kent, England, her father, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, was 42 and her mother, Margaret de Clare, was 30. She married Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead about 1330, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died from 1344 to 1347.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Badlesmere est née environ 1316, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Clare, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead environ 1330, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée du 1344 au 1347.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Badlesmere um 1316 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere 42 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Clare 30. Sie hat um 1330 in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb von 1344 bis 1347.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Badlesmere è nata il circa 1316 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Clare, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead circa 1330, nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì da 1344 a 1347.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Badlesmereが約1316年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir Bartholomew Badlesmereは42歳，母Margaret de Clareは30歳であった。約1330年にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーでSir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlesteadと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女はから1344年まで1347年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Badlesmere(이)가 대략 1316년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Clare(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 부터 1347년 까지 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Badlesmere nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Clare, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead aproximadamente 1330, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu de 1344 a 1347.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Badlesmere родилась около 1316 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Clare, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead около 1330 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла с 1344 по 1347.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Badlesmere nació aproximadamente 1316, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret de Clare, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead aproximadamente 1330, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió desde 1344 hasta 1347.
